_comment: STATIC econ-event definitions (BACKLOG #21). Stable per-event fields only -- edited when you start/stop tracking an event, NOT monthly. The volatile release time + consensus live per-date in data/<date>/econ_schedule_<date>.json and are joined to a definition by `name` when the scheduler arms the day. hot_direction = BTC direction when actual > consensus (CPI/Core/NFP=bearish i.e. hawkish; unemployment=bullish i.e. dovish). inline_band = surprise within which it's in-line (neutral); high_band = surprise beyond which it's high impact, else low. kind: mom_pct = MoM % from an index series (actual=(latest-prev)/prev*100); mom_change = latest-prev in the series' own units; level = the latest value as-is.
name: CPI MoM
